title: Gina app.json
description: Bundle application configuration. Defines the bundle identity, HTTP/2 upstream proxies, and external API credentials.

name.description: Bundle name. Must match the directory name under src/.

greeting.description: Optional greeting message exposed on the default route.

proxy.description: HTTP/2 upstream proxy definitions. Each key is a logical upstream name; the value describes how to reach it.

apis.description: External API credentials and config, keyed by service name.

_comment.description: Internal documentation comment. Ignored at runtime.

ca.description: Path to the CA certificate file for TLS verification. Supports ${variable} interpolation.

hostname.description: Upstream host. Use "bundle@project" notation to reference another Gina bundle (e.g. "coreapi@myproject").

port.description: Upstream port. Use "bundle@project" notation to inherit the bundle's configured port.

path.description: Base path prefix for all requests forwarded to this upstream.

requestTimeout.description: Request timeout as a duration string (e.g. "30s", "2m"). Defaults to the framework default if omitted.
